name: Cheat On Me, If You Can
overview: Kang Yeo-joo is a best-selling writer. She only writes crime stories, dealing with cruel murder cases. She constantly thinks about how to murder people for her novels. Kang Yeo-Joo is married to Han Woo-sung. He is a lawyer, specializing in divorce. He wrote a memo to his wife stating "If I cheat, I die."

trailers.title: CHEAT ON ME IF YOU CAN Teaser #1 | Cho Yeo Jeong, Go Joon | Coming to Viu
